title: Bonds to constitute negotiable instruments
doc_html:
§4254. Bonds to constitute negotiable instruments

           All bonds issued under the provisions of this Subpart shall constitute negotiable instruments within the meaning of the negotiable instruments law.
doc_text:
§4254.  Bonds to constitute negotiable instruments
All bonds issued under the provisions of this Subpart shall constitute
negotiable instruments within the meaning of the negotiable instruments law.
